title: Microsoft Purview Unified Catalog — glossary terms
description: Desired state for Unified Catalog glossary terms. Distinct from the classic Data Map glossary (data-plane/glossary/). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/purview/purview-unified-catalog/terms/create (fetched 2026-07-08). Added per ADR 0047 §Decision item 5. Field shape mirrors the Terms — Create request body, minus server-managed fields (id, systemData). No reconciler ships with this schema; see docs/adr/0047-unified-catalog-preview-api-coexistence.md §Decision item 10.

items.description: List of glossary terms. Default state is the empty list.

name.description: Display name. Unique within the parent domain.

domain.description: Parent business domain name. Must match an entry in business-domains.yaml. Resolved to the domain's UUID at deploy time.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Maps to the API's CatalogModelStatus.

isLeaf.description: Whether this term is a leaf node in the term hierarchy.

parentTerm.description: Name of the parent term. Resolved to parentId at deploy time.

owners.description: Entra principal display names mapped to contacts.owner. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023.

experts.description: Entra principal display names mapped to contacts.expert. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023.

databaseAdmins.description: Entra principal display names mapped to contacts.databaseAdmin. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023.

managedAttributes.description: Custom attributes. Value support deferred until the live reconciler item confirms the full CatalogModelManagedAttribute shape against the Swagger spec.
